info.name: Event Manager API
info.description:
Simple API documentation for the Event Manager + Help Desk application.

Authentication:
- Session-based auth with Laravel Sanctum
- Frontend should first call GET /sanctum/csrf-cookie
- Then call POST /login
- Protected /api/* endpoints require authenticated session cookies

request.description: Must be called before login when using SPA + Sanctum session auth.

response.name: Reset link sent
Event list
Updated chat after message send
